title: armeria bourgaei subsp. willkommiana
intro: Armeria bourgaei subsp. willkommiana, also known as the Corsican thrift, is a subspecies of the Armeria bourgaei plant, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It is a flowering plant that belongs to the primrose family and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, due to their expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The herbal preparations of Armeria bourgaei subsp. willkommiana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve coughs and congestion, and to soothe sore throats and respiratory tract infections.
